name: Overwatch File 45: Marzia Bartalotti
description:
.•. 🌎 .•.

Vendetta is the 45th hero of Overwatch. She will be playable from November 26 to December 1, 2025, before becoming fully playable in Season 20.

• 🌎

Vendetta is a dive-focused Damage Hero who takes big risks for big rewards. She needs to really commit when she engages, but if you can make the most of her mobility, speed, and unique defensive mechanic, she becomes a terrifying threat to squishy backline heroes.

• 🌎

Vendetta, the She-Wolf of Retaliation (Italian: "La Lupa Della Ritorsione") is a gladiator at Colosseo. Having carved out her place among the arena’s elite, she cuts down enemies with ruthless, regal precision. Beneath the surface, her ambitions run deeper. Each gladiatorial victory is a calculated step towards something greater. Amid the roars of the Colosseo crowd, she steps into the spotlight...and she's not going anywhere without a fight.

• 🌎

After her father's death, Vendetta was denied her inheritance, and cast into the pits of Colosseo. She carved out a legacy for herself in the only way she knew how—through blade and fury. She became a gladiator within the arena, and became a celebrity of sorts, earning the moniker of "La Lupa" (the Wolf). In the context of the gladitorial matches of Colosseo, she became known as a villain. She hated it at first; the cheers and jeers of the crowd reminded her of the sycophants that her father had surrounded himself with. Nevertheless, she clawed her way into legend through the brutal world of arena combat. With every victory, her influence grew. Outside the arena however, whispers of her past continued to proliferate.

• 🌎

Vendetta climbed the ranks and earned a place among Colosseo's elite, and her imposing silhouette decorated the walls of the Arena Victoriae. She (re)joined Talon, starting off in its lower ranks. Just as it had been in the Colosseo, her ambitions cut far deeper than her loyalty.

• 🌎 •

🔥• Vengeful / Driven by loss: Vendetta’s backstory involves her father (Antonio Bartalotti) — she seems shaped by that loss, which likely fuels her intensity, rage, or desire for redemption / justice / revenge.

🔥 • Relentless ambition & survival-mindset: She climbed the brutal arena system of Colosseo and became a top gladiator. That suggests she’s tough, determined, hardened, and refuses to be underestimated.

🔥 • Calculated predator / tactical fighter: The “She-Wolf” moniker and her combat style hint she’s more than a brute — she stalks, chooses the moment, strikes hard. She likely values precision, timing, and surprise, rather than silly recklessness.
creator: IDontKnow125
